summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kshana Contour Boutique app - all requested features verified working correctly. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows working.
passed_tests: Admin login with phone 9876543210 and password admin123
Orders page shows View, Invoice, WhatsApp buttons on each order card
New Order form has measurements as SEPARATE card below Items card
Order KSH-636 has order-level measurements (padded, chest, waist, etc.)
Create order with order-level measurements works correctly
Invoice page (KSH-636) shows ONLY items table and billing - NO measurements
Gallery page has Upload Image button that opens modal with file upload
Gallery upload modal has Title, Category fields and file selector
WhatsApp endpoint returns whatsapp_url with wa.me link
WhatsApp message types: status_update, order_created, payment_reminder all work
seed_data_creation: Test orders created via API during testing (TEST Order Measurements)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from the review request verified working: 1) Invoice shows only items+billing (no measurements), 2) Measurements are at order level (separate card in OrderForm), 3) Gallery has file upload via object storage, 4) WhatsApp endpoint generates wa.me URLs, 5) Orders page has View/Invoice/WhatsApp buttons. Order KSH-636 exists with order-level measurements for testing.
